name: Jacobs Solutions Inc.
description: Jacobs Solutions is a global provider of engineering, design, procurement, construction, and maintenance services as well as cyber engineering and security solutions. The firm serves industrial, commercial, and government clients in a wide variety of sectors, including water, transportation, healthcare, technology, and chemicals. Jacobs Solutions employs approximately 60,000 workers. The company generated $12 billion in revenue in fiscal 2025.
sic_description: HEAVY CONSTRUCTION OTHER THAN BLDG CONST - CONTRACTORS
